name: Savory Lime Corn
recipeIngredient: 8 ears of corn on the cob
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 6 quarts of water to a boil in a stockpot over a moderately-high flame.
2. Add the corn and simmer for 7-10 minutes, until tender.
3. Drain the corn and arrange in a serving dish.
4. Combine the butter, savory seasoning, and lime zest in a small bowl; mix well.
5. Serve hot with the flavored butter on the side.
